reviews.title: Great Tool for Hybrid Environments
reviews.text: Outstanding product! Used it as a conference device at my Church for a prayer meeting which was in a midsize sanctuary with people dialed into the prayer call and then for a class with students in person and on Zoom. It worked like a charm! I highly recommend it!
reviews.author: DavidJ

reviews.title: Anker Speaker Phone
reviews.text: Seamless function and features. perfect with Apple iPhone. does not clip speech and follows the speaker. Well designed and thought through.
reviews.author: NealG

reviews.title: Very Clear
reviews.text: Worrh it as long as you don't have other devices connected to your computer or phone. Disconnect them beforehand to prevent any issues.
reviews.author: Elles

reviews.title: Quality and performs well for small scale meeting
reviews.text: Works well for conference meetings of 5-8 people in a quiet 15x15 ft or smaller room. Microphone is excellent and clarity is crisp for people on both sides of the call. Bluetooth range is crazy far. Battery life is also sufficient. The only thing I would improve on this is I wish the volume could go louder. This  struggles in too large of a space.
reviews.author: Warzoneplayer

reviews.title: Highly Recommended Speakerphone Conference Speaker
reviews.text: A friend recommended this Speakerphone Conference Speaker for our non-profit organization's hybrid zoom meeting. It was the best recommendation ever, because this speaker proved to be an excellent product by providing very clear audio for all to benefit from the meeting, even those who are hard of hearing. Great product and highly recommended.
reviews.author: RoseMitchell

reviews.title: Anker Ultra Clear Speakerphone
reviews.text: Excellent Product I would recommend Anker speakerphone to everyone
reviews.author: Richardt

reviews.title: work conference call speaker
reviews.text: I have weekly conference calls and needed something better and this has been great for sound and clarity
reviews.author: Michael

reviews.title: Returned this.
reviews.text: It just didn't work well for me. Everyone I met with had an issue with hearing me. People said I sounded muffled. Returned it.
reviews.author: LauraS

reviews.title: Decent, but not a fit for me
reviews.text: Sound was clear and it looked sleek great for basic calls. But the mic didn’t pick up well in group settings like I hoped, and sometimes people said I sounded distant. It’s a solid product, just didn’t meet my needs, so I returned it.
reviews.author: Jhun

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Unit sounds grsat, we use it for meetings with 15 people in the room
reviews.author: Dave

reviews.title: Easy to use(plug n play), good audio, sleek design
reviews.text: Super easy to use. Plug n play. Good quality, if not great. Reason for giving 4 stars is price vs quality. I paid $139 for it and was hoping for really good audio. It was ok just not what I wanted. I am keeping it though for its sleek design and decent audio.

reviews.title: LOVE IT!
reviews.text: THIS SPEAKER IS LOADED AND WORKS GREAT!  NO DELAY WHEN TALKING!
reviews.author: ArmandoP

reviews.title: Great conference room mic and speaker
reviews.text: For the price - this will amaze you at how good the fidelity is for not only the speaker but the mic as well.  This worked beautifully in a large room with multiple people sitting a good distance from the mic.   Everyone on the zoom call could hear them and the speaker for their voice to us was clear and at a good volume.   A key feature is the mic array that moves the mic listener in the direction of the person speaking.  Also -  the battery capacity is very surprising.  Multiple meetings at one hour each and the battery is still at 80%
reviews.author: CliffR

reviews.title: Home office speaker phone.
reviews.text:
Plug and play. Easy to use.
I route through my Thunderbolt monitor. Everything fires up when I turn on the monitor.
reviews.author: Student

reviews.title: 100% what I expected
reviews.text: I did a lot of research before buying this item, and I'm not disappointed at all after using the Speakerphone several times by now. I truly recommend it.
reviews.author: user318499

reviews.title: Great speaker and mic quality
reviews.text: This anker product is great. We use in a large conference room. The speaker is loud enough so everyone in the room can hear the person connected. The array of microphones are also great. People can hear anything being said on the other side. We used for 3 days, 9 hours a day and plugged in to charge at the 3rd day. Setup was very easy, used as a Bluetooth speaker mic on Google meeting.
reviews.author: Caseta

reviews.title: Does not last long
reviews.text: You’d think that with the cost, one would have the best speaker/mic combo.  The speaker and mute functionality worked great.  The mic stopped working a few months after using, of course after the window of return.  No one could hear me in meetings.  It was a waste of money.
reviews.author: objectObject

reviews.title: Sound and Quality
reviews.text: Unfortunately, no matter what adjustments I made no one could ever hear me and the sound I received was very muffled and unclear.  Throwing in the trash after a couples months of trying to use.
reviews.author: LeslieN

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: Love using this for work calls and watching training videos. Sound is great and mic works perfectly
reviews.author: FeleciaD

reviews.title: Anker -PowerConf speaker
reviews.text: The Anker PowerConf Speaker works great - It was very easy to set up - sound is clear
reviews.author: JimC

reviews.title: Good product, but has connection issues
reviews.text: When it works good, it’s great. We’ve ran into where it disconnects from our system and we don’t realize it until we are signing onto team meeting and then don’t have time to reconnect and have to use one of our phones. When it is working, sounds is great Etc. It is just frustrating when. It does not stay connected.
reviews.author: user389684

reviews.title: Not a great speaker with this price range
reviews.text:
There are several inconveniences,
1. You cannot charge the speaker at the same time you want to use it.
2. The mute button on the speaker doesn’t interact well with Teams or Zoom applications mute controls which ideally should have worked at this price range.
3. My colleagues have started complaining that my voice is not coming through clearly and it’s muffled a bit after starting using it. Not sure if I’ve got a defective piece.
reviews.author: Karthik

reviews.title: packs a punch
reviews.text: the device is very useful & a must have for home office, the speakers & microphone are awesome, voice clarity &back ground noise cancelling help during conference calls. the device will surprise you with great performance plus you get a battery pack as well.
reviews.author: anonymous

reviews.title: Perfect for my home office
reviews.text: This is perfect for my home office when I’m on calls and multi tasking. I haven’t had any complaints about call quality.
reviews.author: Planodad

reviews.title: Excellent speakerphone
reviews.text: This device works seamlessly with Zoom, producing crisp, clear sound.  It's light and durable and easy to use.  It charges fairly quickly and stays charged for a long time. A great product.
reviews.author: PaulH

reviews.title: This speaker is amazing
reviews.text: It was an amazing speaker. I'm very impressed with it. 10 out of 10 stars
reviews.author: EliB

reviews.title: Great Microphone and Speaker for ZOOM meetings
reviews.text: Bought this item to use with our ZOOM meetings,  Outstanding quality
reviews.author: Gizzer9

reviews.title: great wile it lasted
reviews.text: it was perfect for recording my D and d sessions or conference calls with multiple people on my end of the call... until the microphone just stopped working for more than 10 minutes at a time.
reviews.author: Matt

reviews.title: Impressive device
reviews.text: Used it for virtual baby shower. It was awesome because everyone could hear each other talk on zoom over the commotion of the party. Works in noisy outdoor environment up to 8 feet away.
reviews.author: Babymomma

reviews.title: Good product but I got a lemon
reviews.text: I purchased this device in 2021 and it’s worked great. Out of the blue it just stopped working. Now it will randomly start making a very loud screeching sound which is beyond weird. I unplugged it and it won’t stop. I literally had to take it out to my garage because it was so loud. I’m hesitant to purchase another one but maybe I just bought a lemon.
reviews.author: DonnaP

reviews.title: Office speaker
reviews.text:
Purchased for our company conference room 
And it works great very clear sound . Easy to use and small enough that it don’t take up a lot of space.
reviews.author: AnnmarieM

reviews.title: Construction
reviews.text: Works well when you have 4+ people in one room....
reviews.author: JoeyT

reviews.title: Home office upgrade!
reviews.text: I dont know why I didnt get this sooner, WAY better than monitor or laptop speaker for Teams meetings, presentations
reviews.author: Excellent

reviews.title: Polycom Brad
reviews.text: Excellent quality.   I’ve allowed others on my work team to use it with very positive feedback
reviews.author: BradA

reviews.title: Anker PowerConf Bluetooth Speakerphone Conf. Spkr.
reviews.text: We have actually purchased a couple of these for our staff that have remote and/or Zoom conferences with both staff and our clients.  These are of great quality and provide exactly what is needed for successful meetings and conferences...

reviews.title: Great buy for frequent calls
reviews.text: Daily use for work and conference calls.  Excellent noise suppression with clear voice broadcast. Normally plugged in using USB, but it works just fine for travel.  Small and easy to pack with a long battery charge.
reviews.author: TJRB

reviews.title: Good voice quality
reviews.text: Like the price and sound system built in. Good vakue for money
reviews.author: Ahmad

reviews.title: Easy to connect
reviews.text: I used with my computer and i like its quality and connectivity is very easy.
reviews.author: Harry

reviews.title: Excellent for teams meetings
reviews.text: Excellent for teams meetings and conference callls. Directional mics pickup at all angles even if your not speaking directly into the device. Sound is clear and loud enough for a room
reviews.author: sucks

reviews.title: Great device to do meetings
reviews.text: Easy to connect, it capture the sounds from everyone around and close to the device, nice noise cancelling, very good device for meeting using laptops that have more than 3 persons
reviews.author: Dudsrj

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great little speaker! Great for our office meetings
reviews.author: Rachel

reviews.title: Great for video conferencing
reviews.text: Now I can video conference without a headset.  The sound quality on this is much better than any conference speaker I tried.  Love it.
reviews.author: mh111

reviews.title: Awesome product, set it up and forget it,
reviews.text:
Very nice product, clear sound in and out
Nice to meetings
reviews.author: Mukul

reviews.title: Excellent for Conference Calls
reviews.text: Love the speaker for meetings.  Mic works well and sound is clear.  My only issue is the volume.  For it to be heard on my computer, you really have to crank the volume up.
reviews.author: MSPTrooper

reviews.title: Excellend speakerphone
reviews.text: Excellent speakerphone for home or on the go.  The mics would pickup my voice from across the room.  People on the other end could hear me just fine.  Volume level is very good too!  Can be used to charge phone and play bluetooth audio.
reviews.author: bigdaddynorcal

reviews.title: Review
reviews.text: Amazing sound! Easy to connect! Lasted all day of a 6 hour class and the next day for a 3 hour class.
reviews.author: Joys

reviews.title: Would purchase again - worth the investment!
reviews.text:
Great unit - really impressive honestly. Functionality is great, and the sound clarity is awesome.

No issues at all really, except some times my cell phone bluetooth connection will pick up and transfer the call from my phone to the unit. So... if you're in another room of the home and answer your phone, it will transfer to the conference speaker. Annoying, but I guess I'll deal with it.
reviews.author: mketony

reviews.title: Great audio
reviews.text: Very good audio quality, connectivity and battery life
reviews.author: Olden

reviews.title: Can hear clearing
reviews.text: Works well for our Small group setting.class hears clearly persons on phone and vice verse.
reviews.author: Pcptx

reviews.title: Good wireless microphone.
reviews.text: Works well, sound quality is adequate. Easy to connect without driver headaches.
reviews.author: LPMo

reviews.title: Very clear sound quality for Zoom calls
reviews.text: I now am a permanent work from home employee and needed a way to participate in Zoom calls on my MacBook Pro that was better than the built ins on the computer and was not a headset. I am very happy with this speakerphone. I do not use it on BlueTooth - I do have it plugged into a docking station. I can get the sound plenty loud enough to hear over my air conditioner and fan. If I'm not speaking, the mic will cancel out the sound from my AC, but the AC can be heard - a bit - in in the background if I am speaking. Not any worse than a standard set of headphones though. The mute button does actually mute the Zoom app, which is nice and since I wear glasses - not having to wear headphones anymore is delightful.
reviews.author: Tracy

reviews.title: Great product for the price
reviews.text: Great for Teams use and can mute from the speaker itself.  Works best on Bluetooth.  You can’t have Bluetooth on and have the usb connected to your computer to charge.  You must charge to an outlet or other power source.
reviews.author: DanC

reviews.title: Worth it!
reviews.text: Great device! Highly recommend, works as advertise, easy to use.
reviews.author: hpdatalightseeker

reviews.title: Very convenient
reviews.text: Easy to use. Very convenient. Use for work and personal.
reviews.author: Zahid

reviews.title: Affordable BT conferencing speaker.
reviews.text: Use it in one of our small conference rooms. Looks and sounds great! Easy to connect.
reviews.author: BestBuyEliteCustomer

reviews.title: Worked well as alternative to webcam mic
reviews.text: Set this up for a small conference room that had a desktop connected to a large flat screen tv. The desktop had a webcam on it but the mic wasn't able to pickup all voices in the room. The conference table in the room can seat about 12 people. Paired this speakerphone to the desktop via bluetooth and reconfigured zoom to use the Anker speakerphone instead of the webcam mic. Big improvement overall. Anywhere around the conference table was clear to the zoom attendees and vice versa. On a side note, the desktop didn't already have bluetooth built-in so a USB bluetooth adapter was installed for the pairing.
reviews.author: VergeTech

reviews.title: Conference Room
reviews.text:
Works great on conf room table 
I would buy again.
reviews.author: Bclickcfp

reviews.title: Works perfect
reviews.text: This little thing is good. It’s clear thru the speaker and talking thru it is nice and clear for the other party
reviews.author: Ja808

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.text: The sound quality was good, and it picked up voices from all around the table.  It allowed for a remote meeting with no problem.
reviews.author: JoWill

reviews.title: Cost effective conference speakerphone
reviews.text: It works great.  Not really meant for a larger group but has worked for a group of 12.
reviews.author: HPattH

reviews.title: Blue tooth conference speaker
reviews.text: This is a great bluetooth conference speaker.  Very clear sound.  Good quality microphone. Would definitely recommend.
reviews.author: Matt

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.text: Sound quality is good, but there's no way to turn off the annoying light in the middle.
reviews.author: Itsamemario

reviews.title: Great sound quality for the price!
reviews.text: Sounds great and everyone hears me great.  It sometimes searches for a bluetooth when there is not an active sound from an application on the computer that can be annoying.  But I just turn it off when that happens.
reviews.author: JustinG

reviews.title: 1 year in, working as new
reviews.text:
Great product for the home office or the office office. Extremely loud and clear for voice calls and picks up voice from a much longer distance than a phone giving you freedom to move around. The mute function is convenient, and it's easy to connect and reconnect with multiple Android and Apple phones. I would class myself as a light user, probably averaging less than 1 call/day, but even so it has been a worthwhile purchase. 

P.S. don't even think of playing music on one of these conference speakerphones, the sound quality for music is worse than an iPad's built-in speaker.
reviews.author: alfa166

reviews.title: Excellent speaker
reviews.text: I have other speakers and the voice sound was terrible. This speaker produced and played voices very well. It has worked perfectly for Zoom calls and my new VOIP phone.
reviews.author: Musthave

reviews.title: Multi-dimensional Microphone Really Works
reviews.text: Excellent microphone for the money and it really works
reviews.author: Church

reviews.title: amazing product
reviews.text: awesome product. no issues clear sound and easy to use.
reviews.author: KingMedic

reviews.title: Best investment for your Work from Home situation!
reviews.text: Produces amazing sound quality! So much easier for work calls.
reviews.author: longfellow17

reviews.title: Awesome product by anker
reviews.text: My life is easy after I bought this device as i attend lots of meetings and putting over the ear headphones were not much comfortable. This a nice to have product if ur job makes u attend those long meetings.
reviews.author: Rozer

reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: Got this for web meetings with customers. Does exactly as you’d expect. Volume is crystal clear and very loud. Not issues with mic on their end. Great speaker and what I expected from Anker!
reviews.author: iBilly

reviews.title: Not  up to Anker normal quality
reviews.text:
Speaker feature worked great in a meeting room holding 12 attendees.  Microphone pickup very spotty.  Three attendees came through clearly, the others spotty or simply garbled.

Will run one more test with a different laptop to try to isolate the problem, but disappointing on initial use.
reviews.author: Disappointed

reviews.title: Perfect Gadget for Conference Calls
reviews.text: Used many times as conference speaker and works really well. Love everything about this product!
reviews.author: BBbuyer

reviews.title: Works amazing for Teams meetings
reviews.text: Works great for our Teams meetings, bought an extra one for our other conference room.
reviews.author: Wshurme

reviews.title: Great for virtual meetings and as a music speaker
reviews.text: This speaker/mic is fantastic. I'm in virtual meetings every day and got tired of wearing a headset. This is perfect. The mic works well and I come across clear. I also use it as a speaker to listen to music. The Bluetooth pairing sometimes takes a little long to connect.
reviews.author: jjay

reviews.title: Satisified.
reviews.text: Excellent, Worked as expected. Using for the office zoom calls. Had to be in a 5-6 hour-long call and the device give no issue.
reviews.author: Anker

reviews.title: Conference speaker
reviews.text: Solid speaker to use for work calls. Much better quality than computer speakers and don't need to use headphones or a headset.
reviews.author: Fgyyrg

reviews.title: Great speaker for Conferences
reviews.text: Very happy with the purchase.  I have it plugged into my laptop and use it for all of my video-conference calls
reviews.author: RSTampa

reviews.title: Anker
reviews.text: Great value and works as should, would buy again!!
reviews.author: Steve

reviews.title: Quality sounds
reviews.text: This works great. Easy to connect and install. Quality sound for my Zoom meetings and Teams calls.
reviews.author: CDFMichigan

reviews.title: Awesome Product
reviews.text: Better than expected! Great volume and clarity! Easy setup!

reviews.title: works for conference calls, recommend
reviews.text: so far so good. it works well for team meeting and zoom meeting, it also works with webex.
reviews.author: Amazinghit

reviews.title: Easy to Use
reviews.text: Works great!  Very easy to use and easy to connect.  Works great with Zoom.
reviews.author: ShokTherapy

reviews.title: worth it
reviews.text: Pretty decent. The microphones work well and you dont have to lean into the product. The speaker itself is great!
reviews.author: unhappy

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Perfect product. I awe of it. The touch buttons for control is a good add and very responsive.
reviews.author: Nani

reviews.title: Nice audio
reviews.text: This device works excellent for conference calls. Quality is clean and loud. The distance from your computer is short though. So stay close. Setup was easy and quick.
reviews.author: Nupe04

reviews.title: Great value and function
reviews.text: Just what I needed for hybrid Zoom calls.  Mic and speaker sound are both great, picking up voices of the surrounding in-person group.  Paired easily right out of the box with my MacBook Air
reviews.author: PJbrowne

reviews.title: Works speaker for live conference's
reviews.text: It doesn't always connect to my phone. When it's plugged into the laptop has a loud bussing noise sometimes.
reviews.author: Vreed

reviews.title: Very nice product
reviews.text: This was easy to set up and works very well. Voices are very clear coming out of this speakerphone.
reviews.author: RichM

reviews.title: Who knew!
reviews.text: Going from a laptop mic and speakers to this was night and day difference. I should have done it long ago. I'm out in the field a lot and mobile so having this chargeable device is a life saver. Bluetooth works great, the microphones work great as well as the speaker. No longer asking people to repeat themselves or having to mute the call all the time due to the laptop picking up all kinds of background noise. Very good investment.
reviews.author: Preston

reviews.title: Huge improvement over cell phone speakers
reviews.text: Very easy to pair with a phone.  Works better than just using the speakerphone on your phone.
reviews.author: JJHi

reviews.title: good quality
reviews.text: Good Sound, Good pickup of voices, Good value, and easy to use!
reviews.author: Bruce

reviews.title: Good buy
reviews.text: Good price and seems clear on bothe the speaking and listening sides.  With that said it is as good as your internet.  If that is not good tick to a landline or cellphone speaker
reviews.author: Bestbuy

reviews.title: Clear sound and microphone
reviews.text:
Excellent sound quality. I can use across bedroom (I work from home) and they can hear me clearly. Solid construction, no cheap materials. 

Took a star off because it takes a few seconds after turning on for microphone to activate. So call comes in, turn speaker on, answer call, and the caller keeps asking “hello, can you hear me?” While I am going “hello… hello… hello…” until they finally say “there you are”. Once connected it is on without issues.
reviews.author: iFan

reviews.title: Love It !!!!!!
reviews.text:
I like this product very much and am using it for my meetings without any troubles.

it has got 6 mics and no problems of losing our voice :)

The touch screen panel with the function keys is very glossy.

I will recommend this product to anyone who wants to attend meetings hands free and with out any ear plugs .
reviews.author: Jeelani

reviews.title: Anker-PowerConf Bluetooth
reviews.text: Sound reproduction good, distance of reception limited, easy to use.....
reviews.author: Frogman

reviews.title: Great for hybrid zoom and online meetings
reviews.text: As we have been plunged into a zoom world, sound quality in both directions has sometimes been a challenge.  This device really helps.  It is especially helpful when you start doing hybrid meetings.  I set it up in the middle of the conference table and the online people can hear everyone.
reviews.author: Birch

reviews.title: Timely for work at home
reviews.text:
I'm using this at home for conference calls. What I really like about it is that I can plug into computer with USB, or it can connect to my cellphone via Bluetooth, making it very portable. 

Sound quality is really good. Both incoming and outgoing.
reviews.author: Frankpgh

reviews.title: Speakerphone works great
reviews.text: This worked great in a conference situation.  My PC does not have Bluetooth, so it was used with the USB cable.  Plug and Play!
reviews.author: GGB2

reviews.title: Great tool for your online video chats!
reviews.text: This is a great tool to add to your video and zoom activities. It is rechargeable. It works with bluetooth, so you can move it to the part of the room you want to amplify. I don't use it as a phone, just as a speaker. You can mute it by pressing the center. It can be louder or quieter. Super easy to set up and use!
reviews.author: TriciaB

reviews.title: Does it job right
reviews.text: I use it as my primary device for all my Skype and cell calls, it does the job right, easy to connect, good sound, no complaints.
reviews.author: Mante
